reviews.comment:
En Semana Santa hicimos una parada. La organización era buena,la comida también y la atención diez puntos. Baños limpios.
Ambiente agradable.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped there during Holy Week. The organization was good, the food was great, and the service was excellent. Clean restrooms. Pleasant atmosphere.

reviews.comment:
Buenas atención en el sector de cargar combustible.
Almorzamos en la parrilla y fué de primera, tanto el vacío como la bondiola.👍🏻👍🏻

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the gas station.
We had lunch at the grill and it was top-notch, both the flank steak and the pork shoulder. 👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.comment:
Buena Atención, sanitarios impecables,funciona muy bien el compresor para regular la presión de los neumáticos y no te cobran por su uso.
Buen espacio para estacionar y descansar antes de seguir manejando .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, spotless restrooms, the tire pressure inflator works perfectly and is free to use. There's ample parking and a good place to rest before continuing your drive.
